a.reason: Broad FWHM (57.1nm) - acceptable but not optimal

b.reason: Wide FWHM (60.8nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation

c.reason: Wide FWHM (102.4nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation, P/S ratio (3.48) > 1.15 - polarizer may be inverted

d.reason: Wide FWHM (68.5nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation
